entities.name: pegvaliase
entities.context: Pegvaliase is an enzyme-substitution therapy approved for individuals with PKU

entities.name: phenylketonuria
entities.context: Phenylketonuria (PKU) is a genetic disorder caused by deficiency of the enzyme phenylalanine hydroxylase

entities.name: PAH
entities.context: genetic disorder caused by deficiency of the enzyme phenylalanine hydroxylase (PAH)

entities.name: phenylalanine hydroxylase
entities.context: deficiency of the enzyme phenylalanine hydroxylase (PAH), which results in phenylalanine (Phe) accumulation

entities.name: phenylalanine
entities.context: phenylalanine (Phe) accumulation in the blood and brain
